mnemonics.title: Greedy Properties
mnemonics.content: Greedy Choices Produce Optimal Solutions - Greedy Choice Property and Optimal Substructure

mnemonics.title: Activity Selection Order
mnemonics.content: Finish First For Maximum Activities - Sort by finish time for activity selection

mnemonics.title: Knapsack Types
mnemonics.content: Fractional = Greedy, 0/1 = DP - Remember which knapsack variant uses which approach
